title: Maven project lifecycle deterministic draft bank

publication.changeSummary: Misconception MCQ, canonical fill-gap, and no code task for Maven project lifecycle; every item remains blocked from formal exams pending independent human review.

items.title: Maven project lifecycle: reject the misconception
items.prompt: Which statement is source-aligned for Java: Beginner to Intermediate and corrects this misconception? If mvn package succeeds once, the pom fully captures the build and the same artifact is guaranteed everywhere.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Compare each option with both the language-specific boundary case and the cited operational model.

feedback.correct: Correct. Treat the POM and locked build policy as an executable contract, pin relevant plugin and dependency behavior, and verify from a clean environment.
feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Treat the POM and locked build policy as an executable contract, pin relevant plugin and dependency behavior, and verify from a clean environment.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction and rejects the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: A human reviewer must verify source fidelity and ensure the distractor remains plausible without teaching it as fact.

options.text: Treat the POM and locked build policy as an executable contract, pin relevant plugin and dependency behavior, and verify from a clean environment.
If mvn package succeeds once, the pom fully captures the build and the same artifact is guaranteed everywhere.

answer.explanation: Treat the POM and locked build policy as an executable contract, pin relevant plugin and dependency behavior, and verify from a clean environment.

items.title: Maven project lifecycle: canonical checkpoint

feedback.correct: Correct. The checkpoint is 'executable contract'. Treat the POM and locked build policy as an executable contract, pin relevant plugin and dependency behavior, and verify from a clean environment.
feedback.incorrect: The phrase must preserve the exact language rule. Treat the POM and locked build policy as an executable contract, pin relevant plugin and dependency behavior, and verify from a clean environment.
